message:
feat(core): enable VDBE runtime IN probe for SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE (bd-3qlh)

Stop eagerly rewriting IN (SELECT ...) and IN table expressions into
literal lists for statements that go through VDBE codegen. The VDBE's
emit_in_probe_expr handles them natively via runtime table scans,
avoiding full materialization of subquery results.

Fallback paths (GROUP BY, JOIN, expression-only SELECT) still eagerly
rewrite IN subqueries since they use the interpreted eval_join_expr
path which doesn't support probe scans.

4 new tests: IN table_name syntax, NOT IN with UPDATE, NOT IN with
DELETE, IN subquery with WHERE predicate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
